calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-16-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Sonya Wong # 11288.

Jonathan Bornstein, Esq. for plaintiff.
Witness Vanessa Portillo was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Madonna Gina Bishop.

After hearing the testimony and considering the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 925 Sutter Street, # 105 SF, CA 94109
The lease is forfeited.
Back rent and hold over damages - $6183.28
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00
Costs - $359.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $6542.28
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-16-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2012 Off Calendar
